title: EXCLUSIVE: SK Hynix Is Where AI Infrastructure, Chips, Memory Converge, Says Direxion as It Launches Leveraged ETF
excerpt: The race to launch ETFs tied to SK Hynix Inc is about more than one of the largest ADR listings in history—it’s a bet that investors are beginning to look be...
content_html:
Benzinga and Yahoo Finance LLC may earn commission or revenue on some items through the links below.

The race to launch ETFs tied to SK Hynix Inc is about more than one of the largest ADR listings in history—it's a bet that investors are beginning to look beyond AI chipmakers like Nvidia and toward the memory companies powering the next generation of artificial intelligence infrastructure.

Direxion on Wednesday launched the Direxion Daily SK Hynix Bull 2X ETF, offering investors 2x the daily performance of SK Hynix's U.S.-listed shares.

The launch comes just days after the South Korean memory-chip giant's blockbuster Nasdaq debut, which is expected to raise up to $29.4 billion, eclipsing Alibaba's record $21.8 billion ADR offering. It also intensifies competition in the category, following Leverage Shares' launches of the 2x Long SK Hynix Daily ETF and 1x Short SK Hynix Daily ETF (CBOE: SKHZ).

Don't Miss:

  • A single bad hire can set a startup back years. Here are the 5 hires founders most often misjudge — and why

  • Still Learning the Market? These 50 Must-Know Terms Can Help You Catch Up Fast

In an interview with Benzinga, Jake Behan, Direxion's head of Capital Markets, said the firm's new leveraged ETF reflects growing trader interest in AI memory, describing SK Hynix as a company at the intersection of semiconductors, AI infrastructure and surging memory-chip demand.

AI Infrastructure Is Becoming the Next Battleground

Direxion believes the investment case extends well beyond the IPO itself. Behan said SK Hynix has become one of the market's most closely watched AI infrastructure companies because of its dominant position in high-bandwidth memory (HBM), a critical component paired with AI accelerators.

"SK Hynix sits at the intersection of several important themes being watched closely by traders, including semiconductors, the AI infrastructure buildout and memory chip demand. The company's proximity to the memory ecosystem, particularly as demand for those products has exploded, has drawn significant interest from the trading community."

The comments underscore a broader shift in the AI investment narrative. While NVIDIA Corp has dominated investor attention over the past two years, companies supplying the memory needed to power increasingly complex AI workloads are attracting greater interest.

SK Hynix is the world's leading supplier of HBM chips and a key memory partner to Nvidia, including the qualification of its next-generation HBM4 products for Nvidia's upcoming Vera Rubin platform.

The company's proximity to the memory ecosystem, particularly as demand for those products has exploded, has drawn significant interest from the trading community."

sentences.zh: SK Hynix 是全球领先的 HBM 芯片供应商，也是 Nvidia 的重要内存合作伙伴，其中包括为 Nvidia 即将推出的 Vera Rubin 平台提供下一代 HBM4 产品的资格认证。

content_html_zh:
Benzinga 和 Yahoo Finance LLC 可能通过以下链接赚取某些项目的佣金或收入。

推出与 SK 海力士公司相关的 ETF 的竞赛不仅仅是历史上规模最大的 ADR 上市之一——投资者开始将目光投向英伟达等人工智能芯片制造商以外的领域，转向为下一代人工智能基础设施提供动力的存储公司。

Direxion 周三推出了 Direxion Daily SK Hynix Bull 2X ETF，为投资者提供 SK Hynix 在美国上市股票每日表现的 2 倍。

就在几天前，这家韩国存储芯片巨头在纳斯达克上市，预计将筹集高达 294 亿美元的资金，超过阿里巴巴创纪录的 218 亿美元 ADR 发行。 Leverage Shares 推出 2 倍多头 SK Hynix 每日 ETF 和 1 倍空头 SK Hynix 每日 ETF（CBOE：SKHZ）后，也加剧了该类别的竞争。

不要错过：

  • 一次糟糕的招聘可能会让一家初创企业倒退数年。 以下是创始人最常误判的 5 名员工——以及原因
  • 还在学习市场吗？ 这 50 个必须知道的术语可以帮助您快速跟上

Direxion 资本市场主管 Jake Behan 在接受 Benzinga 采访时表示，该公司新推出的杠杆 ETF 反映了交易者对 AI 内存日益增长的兴趣，并将 SK Hynix 描述为一家处于半导体、AI 基础设施和不断增长的内存芯片需求交叉点的公司。

AI基础设施正在成为下一个战场

Direxion 认为，投资案例远远超出了 IPO 本身的范围。 Behan 表示，SK 海力士因其在高带宽内存（HBM）领域的主导地位而成为市场上最受关注的人工智能基础设施公司之一，而高带宽内存是与人工智能加速器配对的关键组件。

“SK 海力士处于交易员密切关注的几个重要主题的交叉点，包括半导体、人工智能基础设施建设和存储芯片需求。 该公司靠近内存生态系统，特别是随着这些产品的需求激增，引起了贸易界的极大兴趣。”

这些评论凸显了人工智能投资叙事的更广泛转变。 尽管 NVIDIA 公司在过去两年中一直吸引着投资者的关注，但为日益复杂的人工智能工作负载提供所需内存的公司也吸引了更大的兴趣。

SK Hynix 是全球领先的 HBM 芯片供应商，也是 Nvidia 的重要内存合作伙伴，其中包括为 Nvidia 即将推出的 Vera Rubin 平台提供下一代 HBM4 产品的资格认证。
